summary:
Step 10 'Expected the password field to be visible.' failed. Error: TEST FAILURE

The application did not proceed to OTP verification after submitting patient credentials — an invalid-credentials error was shown instead.

Observations:
- The Patient Portal login form displayed an inline error: 'Credenciais inválidas. Verifique seu documento e senha.'
- The page remained on the Patient Portal login screen; no OTP verification prompt or code entry screen appeared.
